description: The unique identifier for a specific hotel property.
name: property_code

description: The name of the hotel property.
name: property_name

description: The date for which the booking or revenue data is recorded.
name: stay_date

description: The general category or group to which a booking belongs.
name: segment

description: The date when the data snapshot was taken.
name: snapshot_date

description: The unique code for the booking segment.
name: segment_code

description: The broader grouping for the booking segment.
name: segment_group

description: The unique code for the segment group.
name: segment_group_code

description: The financial classification of the booking segment.
name: finance_segment

description: A numerical value used for sorting the segments.
name: segment_sort

description: The number of rooms "on the books" or currently booked.
name: rooms_otb

description: The number of rooms booked for the same time last year.
name: rooms_stly

description: The number of rooms booked for the same time two years ago.
name: rooms_st2y

description: The actual number of rooms booked for the same period last year.
name: rooms_ly_actual

description: The projected number of rooms expected to be booked.
name: rooms_forecast

description: The revenue "on the books" or currently booked.
name: rev_otb

description: The revenue booked for the same time last year.
name: rev_stly

description: The revenue booked for the same time two years ago.
name: rev_st2y

description: The actual revenue for the same period last year.
name: rev_ly_actual

description: The projected revenue expected.
name: rev_forecast

description: The number of rooms that have been cancelled.
name: cancelled_rooms

description: The actual number of cancelled rooms for the same period last year.
name: cancelled_rooms_ly_actual

description: The budgeted number of rooms.
name: rooms_budget

description: The budgeted revenue.
name: rev_budget

description: The number of rooms for which guests did not arrive.
name: noshow_rooms

description: The actual number of no-show rooms for the same period last year.
name: noshow_rooms_ly_actual
